channel.title: Woman on Sergio Méndez Website
channel.description: Recent content in Woman on Sergio Méndez Website

item.title: Women that build the Cloud Native, Cloud Native Guatemala, Online
item.description:
In this panel, Glisse Jorge, Jackeline Benitez, and Andrea Cabrera talk about how they are involved in the technological environment, how they build their cloud-native stack in their work environments, and their experiences participating in ecosystem communities and events.

I was a presenter in this talk together with other organizers in Cloud Native Guatemala.

Event | Spotify

item.title: Women in the Cloud Native environments, Cloud Native Guatemala
item.description:
In March, it was hosted our online Meetup with the Cloud Native Guatemala community and special guests. It was discussed the experiences of various females who have worked with Cloud Native tools, either in their daily work or because of their interest in the cloud world.

We’ll also discuss the progress of KCD Guatemala 2025 in Antigua, Guatemala, and hold a swag giveaway.

I was a presenter in this talk. Event
